title: Crafty Tools
description: Crafty Tools is a lightweight mod that adds new, helpful tools to make Minecraft easier and more fun.
body: # Crafty Tools **_Crafty Tools_** _is a lightweight mod that adds new, helpful tools to make Minecraft easier and more fun._ *** ## Tools Included **Villagers Wand** – Formerly known as _Job Resetter_. Shift + right-click a villager (including Nitwits) to reset its profession, even after trade locking the villager. Villager _Follow Mode_ can be enabled or disabled by right-clicking in the air while holding the wand in your main hand, allowing villagers to follow you. **Name Tag Lanyard** – Right-click to use. A reusable tool that allows players to rename mobs up to 10 times. Works similarly to a name tag. **Torch Placer** – Right-click to open its inventory and load torches inside. When held in the off-hand, it automatically places torches in dark areas using smart placement rules. **Gentle Shears** – Right-click passive mobs (like cows or chickens) to collect drops without hurting them. **Wicked Shears** – Right-click hostile mobs with a chance to grab rare drops safely. **Stone / Iron / Diamond Shears** – Higher durability and better efficiency. *** ### **_Changelog_** For the latest updates, bug fixes, and changes, please refer to the [Changelog](https://crafty-tools.fandom.com/wiki/Changelog). *** _Perfect for modpacks and survival worlds looking for small quality-of-life upgrades._ ## 📖 Wiki For detailed usage, recipes, and tips, visit the [Crafty Tools Wiki](https://crafty-tools.fandom.com/).
